sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Celta Vigo have shown strong attacking form in their last 5 matches, scoring 12 goals with standout performances from Borja Iglesias (5 goals). Rayo Vallecano have been resilient, remaining unbeaten in their last 3 games but struggling to convert chances, with only 5 goals in the same period.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head encounters, matches between Celta Vigo and Rayo Vallecano have been tight, with one draw (0-0) and a narrow 2-1 win for Rayo. Historically, their games tend to be low-scoring, with under 2.5 goals in 5 of the last 7 meetings.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Celta Vigo rank 5th in total goals scored (56) and have a high big chance conversion rate (42.5%), but their defense is vulnerable, conceding 54 goals. Rayo Vallecano have a more balanced but less potent attack (39 goals), with a slightly better defensive record (44 goals conceded).

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Tactics
sections.text: Celta Vigo will rely on Iago Aspas and Borja Iglesias for goals, leveraging their strong final third play (95.4 passes per game). Rayo Vallecano’s strategy may focus on midfield control and counter-attacks, with players like Álvaro García key to creating chances.
